end OeisA080170

unfold GCDCondition PrimePowerCondition
  rw [← Nat.eq_one_iff_not_exists_prime_gt_one]
  let P := ((Nat.divisors k).filter IsPrimePow).max.getD 0
  constructor <;> intro h
  · contrapose! h
    obtain ⟨p, e, hp, he, rfl⟩ : ∃ p e, p.Prime ∧ 0 < e ∧ P = p ^ e := by
      have hP : IsPrimePow P := by
        apply Nat.max_getD_mem
        simp; exact ⟨k, Nat.divisors_self (Nat.ne_of_gt (Nat.le_step hk)), (IsPrimePow.one.not).mp (by sorry)⟩
      exact hp.exists_prime_pow
    use p
    constructor
    · exact hp
    · intro i hi
      have : p ∣ Nat.choose ((i + 2) * p ^ e) (p ^ e) := by sorry
      exact Nat.dvd_trans this (by sorry)
  · intro p hp
    obtain ⟨i, hi, hnp⟩ : ∃ i < k, ¬p ∣ Nat.choose ((i + 2) * k) k := by
      let n := (k + 1) / p
      sorry
    use i, hi, hnp
